notes: Holmes uses Shinwell Johnson as an informant and operative for cases requiring access to London's criminal underworld. Johnson is a reformed criminal whose continued underworld connections make him useful precisely because he can move in circles Holmes cannot enter without risking detection. Holmes provides Johnson with tacit protection and presumably payment; Johnson provides intelligence, contacts, and access. The arrangement is transactional but stable — Johnson appears in two late-canon cases. In The Adventure of the Illustrious Client, Holmes sends Kitty Winter into Baron Gruner's household via Johnson's network.
